system.description:
A thin, weighty rod of dark iron inscribed with spiraling runes.

Benefit. This wand contains the spells @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.Item.6N33hyLWYZCRgkeX]{dispel magic} (pg. 59) and @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.Item.P9LFIH0PW4Zlx3RG]{protection from energy }(pg. 68).

Curse. Each time you fail a spellcasting check with this wand, you also lose the ability to cast a random spell you know until you complete a rest.
